script.title: Trump Exposed Fake News
script.description: Why Trump is the best president and how fake news affects his image
script.narration: Trump's presidency has been marred by fake news. But here's what they don't tell you: he's been a disruptor, and that's what the system fears. A Stanford study found that 71% of news coverage on Trump was negative. That's not journalism, that's agenda. So, what are you believing instead of verifying? The real question is, what's the motive behind the misinformation?

scenes.description: Trump speaking at a press conference
Examples of fake news articles and social media posts
Trump's impact on his supporters and the country

youtube.title: Trump: Best President?
youtube.description: Why Trump is the best president and how fake news affects his image. A Stanford study found that 71% of news coverage on Trump was negative. That's not journalism, that's agenda. So, what are you believing instead of verifying? The real question is, what's the motive behind the misinformation? Is Trump really the best president? Watch to find out. What do you think is the biggest misconception about Trump's presidency?
